notes: Run 1. Serena LSP EOF errors - fell back to grep/read. Findings: missing context in HTTP/subprocess, error propagation gaps.
Run 2. Serena LSP operational. Found verbose-only error silencing in AuditWorkflowRun, redundant AnomalyReport fields, inconsistent NewAnomalyDetector constructor.
Run 3. Extended constructor consistency from agentdrain to cli. Type assertion scan: 5 total in pkg/, all safe comma-ok. Found 1 http.NewRequest without context, redundant double type assertion.
Run 4. Resource lifecycle (defer Close): double-close in fileutil.CopyFile. Concurrency: 6 prod goroutines in pkg/; docker_images.go:148 + spinner.go:140 missing defer recover().

Run 5. Enumerated every non-test func in pkg/ by line count. 17 funcs >400 lines. Issues: extractSafeOutputsConfig 637 lines / 45 repeated parse-and-assign blocks (#31298, table-driven); DownloadWorkflowLogs 513 lines + 26 params (options struct); tracker #31300 for remaining 12. LSP finding: bare receiver-method names like 'extractSafeOutputsConfig' return [] from find_symbol - must qualify as '(*Compiler).extractSafeOutputsConfig'.

Run 6. 50% cached: extended Run 5 param-list flag. Grep pattern '^func [^(]*(...){9,}\)' found 11 funcs with >=10 params. Cluster: RunUpdateWorkflows->UpdateWorkflows->updateWorkflow trio all 14 params forwarded verbatim (#aw_sg6p1). Codebase already has CompileConfig as model. 50% new: depth-nesting scan. Worst: parseToolCallsWithSequence (claude_logs.go:333-425) 7-deep type-assertion ladder depth-11 (#aw_sg6n1). Tracker #aw_sg6p2 catalogues 8 remaining >=10-param funcs. Bash policy blocks running scripts on /dev/null - must Grep/Read directly. Serena qualified-method form reconfirmed.

Run 7. 50% cached: extended Run 5 complexity scan to switch/case axis - ranked 195 files in pkg/ by case-count. Top: frontmatter_parsing.go 58, permissions.go 49, imports.go 45, safe_outputs_permissions.go 35, mcp_config_custom.go 34. 50% new: exported-symbol usage audit via Serena find_referencing_symbols (note: find_symbol with name_path_pattern takes 70s+ on broad queries - prefer Grep for plain name lookups). KEY FINDING: 8 parallel dispatch tables keyed by SafeOutputs handler-type, explicitly documented in safe_outputs_state.go:16-21 as a maintenance hazard - and the comment itself UNDERSTATES the count by half (says 4, actually 8). Three issues: #aw_sg7a1 (8-way dispatch table refactor), #aw_sg7a2 (convertStringToPermissionScope 49-case identity switch collapsible to map lookup), #aw_sg7a3 (parsePermissionsConfig 40-case scope->struct-field switch duplicating permission inventory 4th time). gh CLI 403 in sandbox blocked duplicate detection - proceeded via safeoutputs.

Run 8. 50% cached: extended Run 7 find_referencing_symbols audit to 9 utility packages (sliceutil 90 uses, typeutil 115, jsonutil 5, stringutil 538, semverutil 11). No significant dead-code - all healthy. envutil.GetIntFromEnv at 1 prod site is acceptable. 50% new: magic literal scan in pkg/. KEY FINDINGS: (a) 57 file-mode octal literals (27x 0755, 16x 0644, 10x 0600, 4x 0750) across pkg/ prod - no FilePerm/DirPerm constants in pkg/constants - security inconsistency (awf_helpers.go:182 has explicit comment about umask 0644 leaking secrets, but 16 other 0644 prod sites have no policy justification); (b) 4 sites use literal '30 * time.Second' for http.Client Timeout - centralize as DefaultHTTPClientTimeout. Bonus: mcp_inspect_mcp.go:253 omits Timeout entirely. Issues: #aw_sg8a1 (file perms), #aw_sg8a2 (HTTP timeout).

Run 9. 50% cached: extended Run 8 magic-literal scan from numeric/octal to STRING literals. KEY FINDING: '.github/workflows' literal at 27 prod sites in 21 files vs only 13 sites using constants.GetWorkflowDir() - PLUS the helper's documented GH_AW_WORKFLOWS_DIR env-var override is non-functional (constants.go:334 returns hardcoded filepath.Join without env read; README.md:349,488 claims override works). Doc/code contract drift. Issue #aw_sg9a1. 50% new: interface pollution audit via Serena find_referencing_symbols on all 21 top-level interfaces in pkg/ non-test. KEY FINDING: SHAResolver (pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:59) and ActionSHAResolver (pkg/workflow/action_resolver.go:16) have IDENTICAL single-method signatures - structurally identical interfaces in two packages, single concrete impl *workflow.ActionResolver satisfies both. actionpins one used only as PinContext.Resolver field; workflow one used in 17+ sites. pkg/workflow already imports pkg/actionpins - duplication is purely historical. Issue #aw_sg9a2. Also noted but not filed: ValidatableTool (pkg/workflow/permissions_toolset_data.go:73) has single implementer GitHubToolConfig - defensible. Confirmed Run 8 success: FilePermSensitive/Public/DirPermSensitive/Public NOW exist at pkg/constants/constants.go:73-91. Serena find_referencing_symbols ~2.3s on focused queries - fast for usage audits. gh CLI still 403 in sandbox.

Run 10. 50% cached: extended helper-underadoption pattern (Run 8/9 theme) to runtime constants. CONFIRMED Run 9 #aw_sg9a1 now PARTIALLY fixed: constants.go:339-341 GetWorkflowDir() reads GH_AW_WORKFLOWS_DIR env var (docs/code contract restored). CONFIRMED Run 8 #aw_sg8a2 NOT YET implemented: still 4 sites use literal '30 * time.Second' for http.Client Timeout; no DefaultHTTPClientTimeout in pkg/constants. NEW: pkg/workflow/engine_firewall_support.go has SAME-FILE inconsistency - line 104 uses literal '/tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs/' while sibling function at line 123 uses constants.AWFProxyLogsDir. Issue #aw_sgar2. 50% new: context.Background() leak scan. 28 sites in pkg/ non-test. After triage: 5 production sites pass context.Background() to *ActionResolver.ResolveSHA (a network call via gh api) - workflow/maintenance_workflow.go:70, workflow/action_sha_checker.go:121 (EXPORTED!), workflow/action_reference.go:78+116, cli/copilot_setup.go:25+35. The pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:317 site already demonstrates correct cmp.Or(ctx.Ctx, context.Background()) propagation pattern. Issue #aw_sgar1. Other 23 Background sites are defensible (fallback nil-checks, top-level CLI entry, RunGH non-context convenience wrappers with parallel Context variants). Serena find_referencing_symbols 4.9s for ResolveSHA reference audit.

Run 11. 50% cached: extended Run 9/10 helper-underadoption thread to GH_AW_WORKFLOWS_DIR env-override BYPASS sites. GetWorkflowDir adoption now EXCELLENT - only 1 prod literal of '.github/workflows' string left (cli/add_package_manifest.go:28 as slice element, distinct purpose). HOWEVER discovered new failure mode: filepath.Join(*, '.github', 'workflows') form at 5 prod sites bypasses the env override entirely - dispatch_workflow_file_resolver.go:70 (SEARCH DIR, real bug), copilot_setup.go:186 (MkdirAll target, real bug), init.go:214 (Stat check, real bug), plus dispatch_workflow_validation.go:61 + call_workflow_validation.go:75 (error-msg only, lower severity). Issue #aw_sgbo1. CONFIRMED Run 8 #aw_sg8a2 STILL NOT FIXED 7 days later - no DefaultHTTPClientTimeout in pkg/constants; 4 sites still literal. Cache tracks it, not re-filing. 50% new: init() function audit in pkg/. 11 total init()s. 3 are STUB functions doing only log statements with no actual work: js.go:14-16 ('Script registration completed (embedded scripts removed)'), scripts.go:20-22 (same), expression_patterns.go:92-94 ('Initializing expression pattern regex compilation' - but compilation happens in var blocks below, not init). The js.go + scripts.go stubs admit in their own comments that scripts were removed; the init() bodies are dead code. Issue #aw_sgbo2. Bonus: time.After leak scan found 4 prod sites; 2 in retry loops (add_interactive_workflow.go:41, docker_images.go:194) leak timers per iteration - low severity, didn't file. Also: defer-in-loop scan found nothing in pkg/ - good Go discipline.
